package rulecoverage

func PositiveRepositoryConstructorAcceptsGinEngineOrRouter() string {
    ruleID := "repository_constructor_accepts_gin_engine_or_router"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repository constructors that take transport objects."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
